hover.$description: Background for interactive surfaces, such as cards or panels, in their hover state.

active.$description: Background for interactive surfaces, such as cards or panels, in their pressed/active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Background for surfaces in a selected state.

hover.$description: Background for selected surfaces in their hover state.

disabled.$description: Background for surfaces in a disabled, non-interactive state.

neutral.$description: Neutral-tinted surface background for subtle visual grouping or separation.

primary.$description: Primary-tinted surface background used to brand or highlight an element.

DEFAULT.$description: Background for surfaces in a selected state using the primary accent color.

hover.$description: Background for primary-accented selected surfaces in their hover state.

announcement.$description: Announcement-tinted surface background for promotional or informational callouts.

info.$description: Info-tinted surface background for informational messages or status indicators.

success.$description: Success-tinted surface background for positive feedback or confirmation states.

warning.$description: Warning-tinted surface background for caution messages or states requiring attention.

danger.$description: Danger-tinted surface background for error states or destructive actions.
